body.u: When I like {look} back to the pass I had such great time when I left school at the age of sixteen I started work at a D.I.Y. shop learn the trade going out doing job then I brought myself a piece of land with all the knowledge behind me. I could build my own house to have somethinksomething to have eversince I had left school what I had in mind and that is what happen and once I had finish that house I would work myself up for a foreman on a building site to desiandesign new place in different town all across the country make my firm very famous in what I had acheivedachieved since working at a shop. Then when I got to the age of retiarmentretirement I would live in a little Bungalow and have a Nice Long and wide garage full of working tools ready to make doors to sell to {hom?} would like to use the {doors?}. and that is what happen it was such an intrestinginteresting life now all I do is sit in the armchair near the coal fire and just relax I found that it was such a good life for all the gloryiesglories think which had happen after I had left school. When I first start in a shop then built my own house then went to a building firm made my name there the returned and start {?} {carpeters?} work and just plodding along that is what happen in my pass now I am at eighty five I just sit adnand rest and I think that I deserve a nice long rest after all those year of hard work. Also during those year of hard work I married a nice young lady I had a house out at the countryside had three children and had my own yard with all of the firm digger dump etc. And I use to do out there when I had a {?} work like{?} and also {?} and keep them in a {?} working order so that we could get more work done with good reliable machine work. We all use to help one another out of trouble when we were not at work like repair our car etc and in my spear time I like garden a lot growing think and all at repair my car of my own {?} I have had the odd moments when we had trouble at work when there was a Strike everoneeveryonehathad to stop for a fortnight so we lost a lot of time because we was on contract work so {within?} 3 month we made-up that time by doing overtime and then we was back on our feet as normal I think that I had a good life with the good think and the back then what happen I would love to have my life all over again what a intrestinteresting life I have had.
